success_verification_score.label: mostly_supported

evidence.quote: including 22 proteins that have not been previously listed in the Matrisome Database
The analysis revealed a total of 87 distinct matrisome proteins that were able to be quantitatively examined

issues.reason: Abstract states core matrisome comprised 45% or 73% depending on approach, but Results Section 2.2 specifies 45% (CME) or 51% (SME) for quantification intensities. Results Section 2.1.3 states 73% refers to CME's contribution to the total protein list (83/113), not SME's core percentage. The 73% value for SME core percentage is not supported by detailed results.

success_verification_score.fix_suggestion: Change core_matrisome_percentage_sme to 51% (based on Section 2.2 quantification intensities) or clarify the source of the 73% figure if referring to Abstract only, noting the discrepancy with Results.
